items.title: Amazon will share its Q2 2026 earnings on July 30
items.summary: On July 30, Amazon is set to hold a conference call to discuss its Q2 2026 financial results.

items.title: Dave Treadwell to lead AWS Compute and ML Services as Dave Brown departs
items.summary: Treadwell brings nearly a decade of experience running Amazon’s technology platform to his new role.
